regional_cost_note: Builders in Palmerston North typically charge $75–$110/hr. New build costs range $2,500–$3,600/m². The Manawatu region offers competitive pricing compared to main centres.

businesses.name: Fresh Building Solutions
businesses.known_for: Highly reviewed residential builder offering new homes, renovations, decks, fencing, kitchens, bathrooms, and commercial shop fitting across the Manawatu region.

businesses.known_for: Specialising in renovations, re-cladding, and window replacement for Palmerston North homes.
